calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Candace Walton.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendants Zamir Medina Ruiz and Stephanie Ruiz are present. Defendant Jassmina Sequeira IS NOT.

Attorney Esther Kim representing the defendants through limited scope.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant Jassmina Sequeira. The trial date of MAY-21-2012 remains on calendar.
